item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the requested new gift-processing port, identifies the repeated pattern across three prior queue/route splits, reframes the issue as an upstream routing/intake/capacity failure, and proposes consolidation through a unified exception intake and capacity decision. It does not provide the requested new channel, queue, entrance, handling-port copy, or implementation step."}
